allow: Bash(python3.11 -c "import stripe; from app.settings import settings; print\('stripe OK, key set:', bool\(settings.stripe_secret_key\)\)")
Bash(/opt/homebrew/bin/python3.11 -c "import stripe; from app.settings import settings; print\('stripe OK, key set:', bool\(settings.stripe_secret_key\)\)")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/bin/python3.11 -c "import stripe; print\('stripe version:', stripe.__version__\); from app.settings import settings; print\('stripe OK, key set:', bool\(settings.stripe_secret_key\)\)")

Bash(/opt/homebrew/bin/python3.11 -c "import stripe; print\('stripe version:', stripe._version.VERSION\); from app.settings import settings; print\('stripe OK, key set:', bool\(settings.stripe_secret_key\)\)")
